refund_policy.policy_text: No free trial. If proxies don't work and you can provide proof, we'll issue a refund for the non-functional proxies only. Must provide proof of non-functionality.
conditions: must provide proof proxies don't work

refund_policy.isp_refund: refund for non-functional proxies only (with proof)

notes: Better-than-nothing refund policy — only covers non-functional proxies with proof. No free trial increases risk. Industry expert team. Multiple proxy types offered. Small/medium tier provider. USE WITH CAUTION.
